name: Low-Fat Chimichangas
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16-ounce) black beans, rinsed and drained
1 teaspoon Dried oregano or Italian herbs
1 cup Finely chopped green onion, including tops
1 ½ cups Shredded Jarlsberg Lite cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beans, tomatoes, chili powder, and oregano in a saucepan.
2. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Uncover and continue to simmer, stirring and crushing some of the beans against the side of the pot for another 5 minutes.
4. Set aside.
5. Warm tortillas according to package directions and keep them warm under a hot, damp cloth.
6. Place one tablespoon of bean mixture on the center of each tortilla.
7. Sprinkle with a rounded teaspoon of green onion and then a tablespoon of cheese.
8. Fold opposite sides of the tortillas over the mixture twice, forming square packets.
9. Place the folded packets in a non-stick pan.
10. Repeat steps 6-9 until all ingredients are used.
11. Cook over low heat, covered, for 3 to 5 minutes until heated through and the bottoms are crispy.
Presentation: Serve immediately or keep warm on a covered warming tray.
